info.title: Mnemos API
info.description: Knowledge management and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system with multi-modal chat, document processing, knowledge graphs, and video mixing capabilities.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: API Key authentication (placeholder for future implementation)

summary.example: This paper discusses advances in transformer architectures...

description.example: Collection of papers on artificial intelligence and machine learning

content.example: What are the main components of a transformer?

question.example: What are the key innovations in transformer architecture?

answer.example: Transformers introduced self-attention mechanisms that allow the model to weigh the importance of different parts of the input...

chunk.example: The self-attention mechanism computes attention weights...

hypergraph_llm_provider.description: LLM provider for hypergraph extraction. Empty string inherits the chat provider.

hypergraph_llm_model.description: Model name for hypergraph extraction when a custom provider is set.

content.example: You are a helpful research assistant...
User prefers detailed explanations with examples

description.example: A neural network architecture based on self-attention mechanisms

user_prompt.example: Create a 5-minute overview of transformer architectures

get.description: Retrieve all documents with optional filtering by collection. Returns HTML partial for HTMX requests or JSON.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Filter by collection ID (use 'null' for uncollected documents)

post.description: Upload a file or provide a YouTube URL for processing. Supported formats: PDF, EPUB, audio (MP3, WAV, M4A), video (MP4, WebM, MOV).

201.description: Document created and queued for processing

put.description: Update document tags, stars, comments, or collection assignment.

delete.description: Delete document and associated files from the system.

get.description: Get current processing status (for HTMX polling).
Download the original document file.
Retrieve all sections/chapters for a document (for video/audio files).

post.description: Generate or retrieve transcription for audio/video documents.

get.description: Download transcription as text file.

post.description: Trigger background task to generate document summary using LLM.
Trigger hypergraph (knowledge graph) reprocessing for all or missing documents.
Send a chat message with optional RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) context from documents, web search, or knowledge graph.

200.description: Chat response with answer and sources

get.description: Retrieve all conversation history with optional search.

post.description: Create a new conversation with optional title.

get.description: Retrieve conversation with all messages and related documents.

delete.description: Delete conversation and all associated messages.

get.description: Retrieve all document collections.

post.description: Create a new document collection.

delete.description: Delete collection (documents remain but become uncollected).

get.description: Retrieve all documents belonging to a collection (many-to-many).

200.description: List of documents in the collection

post.description: Add a document to a collection via many-to-many relationship.

delete.description: Remove a document from a collection.

get.description: Retrieve all collections a document belongs to.

200.description: List of collections for the document

post.description: Download GGUF model from HuggingFace.

Import a GGUF model file into llama.cpp.

get.description: Get the currently selected LLM model and provider.

post.description: Set the active LLM model.

get.description: Retrieve all chat and LLM settings.

post.description: Update chat settings, LLM configuration, API keys, etc.

get.description: Get all available system prompts (default and custom).

post.description: Create a new custom system prompt.

delete.description: Delete a custom system prompt (default prompts cannot be deleted).

get.description: Get system RAM and VRAM information.

post.description: Fetch available models from a specific LLM provider.

get.description: Get all custom LLM connection configurations.

Set the active LLM connection.

get.description: Retrieve all long-term user memory facts.

200.description: List of memories with usage statistics

Convert text to speech using configured TTS provider.

post.description: Find reasoning path between two concepts using the knowledge graph.
